overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Grand Theft Auto V showing a character walking along Vinewood Boulevard on a sunny day. The character traverses the Walk of Fame sidewalk past various tourist attractions including the Museum of Illusions and a Believe It or Not building with a rooftop dinosaur statue, crossing multiple intersections with light traffic. The footage features enhanced graphics mods with cinematic lighting and detailed urban environments.

segments.scene_description: The segment begins at a sunny urban intersection with the Universal Studio Store visible on the left. The character crosses the asphalt crosswalk with embedded pink stars, turns right onto the sidewalk, and walks past a green lamppost. The Museum of Illusions building stands on the right corner as sparse pedestrians move through the intersection.

segments.scene_description: Walking along the concrete sidewalk embedded with Walk of Fame stars, the character passes the Museum of Illusions building on the right. The pedestrian density increases to moderate with people walking in opposing directions. A blue mailbox appears on the left while a green supermarket sign and red scaffolding become visible on the right side of the street.

segments.scene_description: The character walks past the distinctive Believe It or Not building with its prominent rooftop dinosaur statue on the left. The In-N-Out Burger sign becomes visible on the right. Pedestrians are scattered along the sidewalk, some standing in groups near a black sedan that has pulled up to the curb. The palm trees lining the street shift from the right to the center of the frame as the character progresses.

events.description: approaching the intersection with the Chateau Marmont sign visible
character steps onto the crosswalk to cross the intersection

agents.ego_description: approaching the intersection and crossing the street with a group of pedestrians

notable_agents.action: elderly man with cane waiting at the crosswalk corner

entered.detail: brown wooden sign with white text mounted on white poles
white bench with yellow Subway restaurant advertisement

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the intersection marked by the Chateau Marmont sign on the right, passing a Subway restaurant bench. The scene opens up to a wide intersection with moderate vehicle traffic. The character joins a group of pedestrians, including an elderly man with a cane, to cross the asphalt crosswalk toward the tall white buildings visible in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a sunny urban boulevard that transitions from a quiet intersection into a bustling tourist district. It begins at a crosswalk marked by pink stars near the Universal Studio Store, moving past a green lamppost and the Museum of Illusions as the camera turns onto the sidewalk. As the character progresses along the Walk of Fame, the pedestrian density increases and the scenery shifts to include a blue mailbox and red scaffolding before passing the Believe It or Not building with its rooftop dinosaur statue. The view then expands to reveal an In-N-Out Burger sign and a black sedan at the curb, with palm trees shifting toward the center of the frame. Finally, the scene opens up at a wide intersection by the Chateau Marmont sign, where the camera follows a group of pedestrians across the asphalt toward tall white buildings in the distance.
